title: Shadow of the Dark World
format_notes: Awesome-O generated this from a CLI chat.
logline: A seemingly ordinary young man, Link, is thrust into a perilous quest after his uncle is gravely wounded rescuing Princess Zelda. He must gather legendary artifacts, wield the fabled Master Sword, and confront a malevolent wizard to prevent the dark lord Ganon's release and the conquest of their world.
themes: courage in the face of overwhelming evil
central_conflict: Link's race against time to understand and embrace his role as a hero, stopping the sorcerer Aghanim from sacrificing Princess Zelda and six other maidens, a ritual that would unleash the ancient evil Ganon from the corrupted Dark World upon the Light World.

setting.primary_time: High fantasy era, contemporary-feel for characters

protagonists.name: Link
protagonists.role: Unassuming hero, destined to wield the Master Sword
protagonists.want: To save his uncle, rescue Zelda, and ultimately prevent Aghanim and Ganon from destroying Hyrule.

key_antagonist.name: Aghanim
key_antagonist.want: To seal the seven maidens, including Princess Zelda, to open a portal to the Dark World and release Ganon.

key_ally.name: Sahasrahla
key_ally.want: To guide Link to acquire the Master Sword and stop Aghanim's plans to release Ganon.

stakes: The total conquest of the Light World by the dark lord Ganon, resulting in the enslavement or destruction of its inhabitants.
